parameters.content:
# Client Onboarding


## How it works

1. A client submits a form from your n8n form, website, Tally, Typeform, Google Form, or any webhook source. One config variable controls which AI provider runs: OpenAI (default) or Anthropic.
2. Fields are normalized into a single clean object so nothing downstream ever breaks when you swap the intake source.
3. The AI reads the submission and writes two things: a 3-sentence internal brief for your team, and a 2-sentence warm summary addressed directly to the client.
4. The full record including the AI brief is logged to Google Sheets and a dedicated client folder is created in Google Drive automatically.
5. Your team gets a Slack ping with the brief and a direct link to the Drive folder before the client email even lands.
6. The client receives a polished welcome email with their AI-personalized summary and a booking link. 24 hours later, a soft follow-up goes out automatically.
7. Optionally, a CEO/COO digest email fires after the follow-up; a clean summary of the new client with the Drive folder link. Toggle it on or off with one config variable.


## Setup steps

- [ ] Connect a Google Form or web form trigger as the intake source
- [ ] Configure OpenAI API credentials and set the prompt for brief generation
- [ ] Set up Google Sheets connection with the target spreadsheet and worksheet
- [ ] Configure Google Drive connection and specify parent folder for new submissions
- [ ] Set up Slack bot credentials and target channel for team notifications
- [ ] Configure Gmail credentials and create email templates for welcome and follow-up messages
- [ ] Verify the 24-hour wait duration matches your follow-up timing requirements


## Customization

You can customize the AI prompt in the 'AI brief' node to generate different summaries. Modify the Slack message format in 'Team ping' for custom notifications. Adjust wait duration in 'Wait 24h' node if you need a different follow-up interval.

## Form intake and normalization

Captures form submissions and standardizes field names and values for downstream processing.

## AI brief generation

Uses OpenAI to generate an intelligent summary or brief from the normalized form data.

## Data logging and storage

Merges AI output with context data, logs to Google Sheets, and creates organized folder structure in Google Drive.

## Team notifications and follow-ups

Notifies team via Slack, sends welcome email to submitter, waits 24 hours, and sends follow-up communication.

nodes.name: When Form Submitted
nodes.notes: Swap for a Webhook node if using Tally, Typeform, or Google Form. Nothing downstream changes.

parameters.formDescription: Tell us about your project. We'll review and be in touch within one business day.

nodes.name: Normalize Form Fields
nodes.notes: Single translation layer. Add field aliases here when adding a new intake source. Downstream never changes.

parameters.jsonOutput:
={
  "clientName": "{{ $json['Full name'] || $json['name'] || $json['full_name'] }}",
  "company":    "{{ $json['Company name'] || $json['company'] || $json['company_name'] }}",
  "email":      "{{ $json['Business email'] || $json['email'] }}",
  "phone":      "{{ $json['Phone number'] || $json['phone'] || '' }}",
  "service":    "{{ $json['Service you\'re interested in'] || $json['service'] }}",
  "challenge":  "{{ $json['Tell us about your challenge'] || $json['challenge'] || $json['message'] }}",
  "budget":     "{{ $json['Budget range'] || $json['budget'] || 'Not specified' }}",
  "startDate":  "{{ $json['Ideal start date'] || $json['start_date'] || 'Flexible' }}",
  "extra":      "{{ $json['Anything else we should know?'] || $json['notes'] || '' }}",
  "submittedAt":"{{ $now.toFormat('yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss') }} GMT+2"
}

nodes.name: Generate AI Brief
nodes.notes: Swap for Anthropic node if preferred. Same prompt works.

values.content:
You are a senior client success specialist. Read the inquiry and return valid JSON only — no markdown, no extra text — with exactly two keys:

"brief": 3 sentences for the internal team. What the client actually needs, which service fits, and the one thing to cover on the discovery call.

"clientSummary": 2 sentences written to the client. Warm, plain language. Acknowledge their specific challenge. No jargon, no hype.

nodes.name: Build Complete Context
nodes.notes: Combines AI output + client data into one object. All nodes below read from this.

parameters.jsonOutput:
={
  "brief":         {{ JSON.parse($json.message.content).brief | json }},
  "clientSummary": {{ JSON.parse($json.message.content).clientSummary | json }},
  "clientName":  "{{ $('Normalize Form Fields').item.json.clientName }}",
  "company":     "{{ $('Normalize Form Fields').item.json.company }}",
  "email":       "{{ $('Normalize Form Fields').item.json.email }}",
  "phone":       "{{ $('Normalize Form Fields').item.json.phone }}",
  "service":     "{{ $('Normalize Form Fields').item.json.service }}",
  "challenge":   "{{ $('Normalize Form Fields').item.json.challenge }}",
  "budget":      "{{ $('Normalize Form Fields').item.json.budget }}",
  "startDate":   "{{ $('Normalize Form Fields').item.json.startDate }}",
  "submittedAt": "{{ $('Normalize Form Fields').item.json.submittedAt }}"
}

nodes.name: Append to Sheets
nodes.notes: One tab called Clients. Filter by Service column in the sheet itself. Sheet columns: Timestamp | Name | Company | Email | Phone | Service | Challenge | Budget | Start date | AI brief | Status

nodes.name: Create Drive Folder
nodes.notes: Set folderId to your master /Clients/ folder ID. Folder name = Company — Service.

parameters.message:
=
[Company Name]

Hi {{ $('Build Complete Context').item.json.clientName.split(' ')[0] }},

Thanks for reaching out. We've received your inquiry about {{ $('Build Complete Context').item.json.service }} and our team has already been briefed.

"{{ $('Build Complete Context').item.json.clientSummary }}"

Here's what happens next:

  1. Book a 30-minute discovery call at your convenience.
  2. We'll review your challenge and ask the right questions.
  3. Within 48 hours of the call, you'll receive a clear proposal.
Book your discovery call

Good to know before the call

  • The call is completely free — no pitch, just listening.
  • Bring whatever you have: a deck, a problem statement, or just a clear head.
  • We'll send over a brief agenda 24 hours before we meet.

If anything changes or you have questions before then, simply reply directly to this email.

Looking forward to it,

[Your Name]

CEO · [Company Name]
parameters.subject: =We've received your inquiry, {{ $('Build Complete Context').item.json.clientName.split(' ')[0] }}

parameters.message:
=

Hi {{ $('Build Complete Context').item.json.clientName.split(' ')[0] }},

Just checking in — wanted to make sure my earlier email landed and the booking link worked.

If scheduling is tricky this week, no problem at all. Feel free to grab any future slot that aligns with your calendar.

Book your discovery call

Or, simply reply directly to this thread — I am happy to coordinate a time over email.

Cheers,

[Your Name]

CEO · [Company Name]
parameters.subject: =Quick check-in, {{ $('Build Complete Context').item.json.clientName.split(' ')[0] }}

nodes.name: Post to Slack Channel
nodes.notes: Replace channelId. Message includes AI brief + Drive folder link.
